title: Wine Regions
editorialSummary: Wine regions grouped by country: France, Italy, Spain, New World (USA/Australia/Argentina). False trail: Rioja and Ribera del Duero are both Spanish; Bordeaux and Burgundy are both French — players may confuse similar-sounding regions. The Foldwink Tab hints reveal country names progressively.

meta.gptRationale: Wine-region groupings are geographically intuitive and mostly famous, with just enough niche regional knowledge to keep it from the very easiest end.
